_meta.description: Sample dataSources payload for the plotly-chart-editor package. 15 African countries with population (millions), GDP nominal (USD billions, 2023 World Bank estimates), and life expectancy (years).
_meta.source: Approximated from World Bank 2023 indicators for development and testing only. Do NOT use for analysis.
_meta.shape: Each top-level key is a column name; each value is a flat array. All columns are the same length.
